examples: In the framework of quarkonia-quarkonia mixing, considering the effect of the flavor-dependent transitions between quarkonia, the new mass relation of a meson nonet is presented.
The thesis surrounds the comparative study of the theory on legal types of Weber, Selznick and Nonet, and the complementary of responsive law to formal rational law is the mainline of the thesis.
On his new CD Streams of Expression, Lovano performs three songs arranged by Gil Evans for the Miles Davis Nonet.
The Miles Davis Nonet's subtle harmonic shadings marked the beginnings of what came to be known as the "cool sound" in jazz.
But the adventurous nonet known as Fight the Big Bull formed in an age of widespread jazz education and instant global communication.
